detail.reason: Supersede v1 TS-only verification tail with the v2 canonical standard (docs/apigen/SPEC.md): code-first descriptor, name-by-exported-symbol extractor (fixes F28/F29), Layer harness + central validation, metadata envelope, plugin capabilities (target/layer/mount/envelope), package restructure (common vs per-language), unified adhd-apigen CLI + sidecar gateway, re-authored integration/DoD against the canonical contract.

Remediation folding both architect reviews: plan-structure R1-R13 (scaffold 9 missing pkgs in final homes, real v2 audit phases, per-state criteria, DoD vs metadata-envelope, DAG edges) + design Tenet 1 + D1-D11 (safe flag, live query, JSON-Schema+$defs IR, §8.1 Layer semantics, §9.1 envelope binding, full streaming, §13.1 gateway failure model). Adds Python host (H1), classes static+instance-opt-in (H2); defers neutral codegen (H3).
